bird.name: Red-naped fruit dove
bird.summary: The red-naped fruit dove (Ptilinopus dohertyi) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Sumba.

locations.name: 松巴島
locations.summary: Sumba (Petjo: Soemba-eiland; Indonesian: pulau Sumba), natively also spelt as Humba, Hubba, Suba, or Zuba (in Sumba lan…

relations.subject: Red-naped fruit dove
relations.evidence: The species is endemic to the island of Sumba in Indonesia, where it mostly inhabits montane forests at elevations above 500 m

relations.subject: Red-naped fruit dove
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
